title: Open Schematics V2 – Largest open electronic schematics dataset
abstract:
Introducing Open Schematics V2 — the largest dataset of electronic schematics and PCB layouts on the internet.

It's a self-growing, autonomous dataset that continuously scans the web for new engineering designs and updates itself accordingly.

Reference designs help you move 10x faster: less
abstract_zh: 嘿，朋友们！我们带来了一个电子元件设计界的“宝藏”——Open Schematics V2。这回它不仅更大更强，还自带生长系统，24小时在线扫雷，确保你总能发现最新的电路板布局。参考设计帮你瞬间从新手变成高手，让你的设计速度提升10倍！快来加入这场电子创意狂欢吧！
